name: The Boone
desc: The Boone is a brand-new 2026 Clayton Homes double-wide built for families who want space without overpaying. At 28×56 ft, it delivers 4 split bedrooms, 2 full baths, a kitchen island with breakfast bar, a dedicated family room, and a utility room — all wrapped in a bright, open floor plan.

name: The Snowcap
desc: The Snowcap is a stunning 2026 Clayton Homes double-wide that delivers 4 bedrooms and 3 full baths across 2,001 sq ft of thoughtfully designed living space. At 28×76 ft, it features an open kitchen-to-living flow, flex space, a den, utility room, and multiple interior and exterior finish packages — offering a truly custom feel at a manufactured home price.

name: Phoenix 32764A
desc: The Phoenix 32764A by Cavco Hamlet is a spacious double-wide designed for the growing family. With 4 bedrooms, 3 baths, and 2,280 sq ft, it features a steel front door, thermopane windows, LED lighting throughout, garden tub with separate shower, kitchen island with dishwasher, and washer/dryer hookup — move-in ready.

name: Phoenix 32684A
desc: The Phoenix 32684A by Cavco Hamlet offers 4 bedrooms, 2 baths, and 2,040 sq ft in a beautifully designed ranch-style double-wide. The open layout connects the living room, kitchen, and dining area seamlessly. Includes steel front door, thermopane windows, garden tub with separate shower, dishwasher, LED can lights, and a 40-gallon water heater.

name: Phoenix 32483A
desc: The Phoenix 32483A by Cavco Hamlet packs smart living into 1,440 sq ft. This 3-bedroom, 2-bath double-wide features a spacious kitchen with island, garden tub with separate shower, vinyl flooring throughout, LED can lights, and washer/dryer hookup — all at an unbeatable price point.

name: Phoenix 32563A
desc: The Phoenix 32563A by Cavco Hamlet delivers 3 bedrooms, 2 baths, and 1,680 sq ft of smart, open living. This 30×56 ft double-wide features a bright kitchen, spacious living room, garden tub with separate shower, LED lighting throughout, steel front door, and washer/dryer hookup. Currently on display at multiple NC locations.

name: Mariner
desc: The Mariner is a solid, welcoming 3-bedroom, 2-bath single-wide offering 1,140 sq ft of functional living space in a 16×76 ft footprint. Designed to balance style, livability, and price, this home features a comfortable layout with durable construction and quality finishes throughout.

name: Explorer
desc: The Explorer is a 3-bedroom, 2-bath double-wide offering 1,475 sq ft in a 28×56 ft footprint. A spacious and flexible layout designed for growing families, featuring quality construction and comfortable finishes that make it feel like home from day one.

name: Tide
desc: The Tide is a smart 2-bedroom, 2-bath double-wide with 1,020 sq ft of efficient, comfortable living space. Perfect for couples, retirees, or anyone looking for a low-maintenance home with quality finishes and solid construction at an accessible price.

name: Pride
desc: The Pride delivers 4 bedrooms and 2 baths across 1,791 sq ft of well-designed double-wide living space. Built for families who need room to grow, it combines durable construction with comfort-oriented finishes and a flexible layout that adapts to your lifestyle.

name: Triumph
desc: The Triumph is a spacious 5-bedroom, 3-bath double-wide with 2,001 sq ft — ideal for large families who refuse to compromise. This home delivers serious space with quality construction, solid finishes, and a layout built to handle the full energy of a busy household.

name: Marvel 4
desc: The Marvel 4 packs 4 bedrooms and 2 baths into 1,475 sq ft of smart double-wide design. A fantastic value for families needing four bedrooms without the big price tag — solid build quality, functional layout, and comfort-oriented finishes throughout.

name: Satisfaction
desc: The Satisfaction lives up to its name — 3 bedrooms, 2 baths, and 1,264 sq ft of thoughtfully designed space. A well-rounded double-wide that balances comfort, functionality, and value, making it a top choice for first-time buyers and downsizers alike.

name: Delight
desc: The Delight is a compact, efficient 2-bedroom, 2-bath home with 820 sq ft — proof that small can still feel great. Ideal for couples, retirees, or budget-conscious buyers, this single-wide delivers solid construction and comfortable finishes in a no-fuss package.

name: Elation
desc: The Elation brings 3 bedrooms and 2 baths into a 902 sq ft single-wide footprint — making homeownership accessible without sacrificing what matters. A great starter home or investment property with dependable Clayton construction and practical finishes.

name: Glory
desc: The Glory offers 3 bedrooms and 2 baths in 1,038 sq ft — a versatile double-wide that's perfect for small families or anyone stepping up from a single-wide. Solid build quality, functional design, and the trusted Clayton Homes name behind every detail.

name: Baby Boujee
desc: The Baby Boujee brings fresh-rustic style to a 3-bedroom, 2-bath single-wide in 1,080 sq ft (16×72 ft). Standard features include drywall throughout, black stainless steel appliances, and a designer coffee bar — because your home should feel special even on a starter budget.

name: Boujee 56
desc: The Boujee 56 is a stylish 3-bedroom, 2-bath double-wide with 1,530 sq ft in a 28×56 ft footprint. Featuring the signature fresh-rustic Boujee Series aesthetic — drywall throughout, black stainless steel appliances, and a designer coffee bar — this home delivers boutique style at a manufactured home price.

name: Boujee 2
desc: The Boujee 2 steps up the Boujee Series with 3 bedrooms, 2 baths, and 1,580 sq ft in a 28×60 ft double-wide. The fresh-rustic interior package features drywall throughout, black stainless steel appliances, and a signature designer coffee bar — elevated living at an honest price.

name: Boujee Lux
desc: The Boujee Lux is the flagship of the Boujee Series — 4 bedrooms, 3 baths, and 2,160 sq ft in a 32×72 ft double-wide. The full fresh-rustic luxury package includes drywall throughout, black stainless steel appliances, a designer coffee bar, and premium finishes that make this home feel truly elevated.

name: Phoenix 16562A
desc: The Phoenix / Augusta 16562A built by Cavco Hamlet is a charming manufactured home featuring 2 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, and 873 square feet of thoughtfully designed space. The open-concept layout enhances the connection between the living area, kitchen, and dining space. The primary suite offers privacy and convenience, while the second bedroom is perfect for guests or an office.

kitchen.Cabinetry: Module Craft Cabinet System / 30" Overhead / Adjustable Shelves

name: Phoenix 16603A
desc: The Liberty Series LB-16603A built by Cavco Phoenix is a thoughtfully designed 3-bedroom, 2-bath single-wide offering 937 square feet of comfortable ranch-style living. Features 8ft flat ceilings, architectural shingles, and a well-appointed kitchen with steel appliances and square-edge countertops.

construction.Wall Height: 8ft interior and exterior with flat ceiling

baths.Lighting: Recessed can lights (no vanity wall light)

kitchen.Drawers: One bank of drawers (no drawers over doors)

name: Phoenix 16663A
desc: The Phoenix 16663A by Cavco Hamlet offers 3 bedrooms, 2 baths, and 990 sq ft in a 66×15 ft single-wide layout. Features LED can lights throughout, thermopane windows, steel front door with storm door, garden tub with separate shower, and a fully equipped kitchen with dishwasher and ample cabinetry.

name: Phoenix 16763A
desc: The Phoenix 16763A by Cavco Hamlet is our largest single-wide — 3 bedrooms, 2 baths, and 1,140 sq ft in a 76×15 ft footprint. Features LED can lights throughout, thermopane windows, steel front door with storm door, garden tub with separate shower, dishwasher, and a full cabinetry package with pantry.

name: Move On Up
desc: The Move On Up (57TMI16723AH) is a 3-bedroom, 2-bath single-wide from Clayton Tempo National spanning 1,080 sq ft in a 16×72 ft footprint. HUD-certified and built for efficient, comfortable living with a full kitchen, utility room, primary suite, and two guest bedrooms.

name: Sweet Caroline
desc: Sweet Caroline (57TMI16763AH) is a spacious 3-bed, 2-bath single-wide with 1,140 sq ft across a 16×76 ft footprint. Features a full primary suite, guest bedrooms, kitchen, utility room, and multiple exterior color options. HUD-certified by Clayton Tempo National.

name: Shout
desc: Shout (57TMI28563AH) is a 3-bed, 2-bath double-wide with 1,475 sq ft in a 28×56 ft footprint. Available in Clay, Flint, Olive, and White exterior colors. Features an open living area, full dining room, utility room, and a spacious primary suite.

name: Lean On Me
desc: Lean On Me (57TMI28563BH) offers 3 bedrooms, 2 baths, and 1,475 sq ft in a 28×56 ft double-wide. Features a flex room, open dining area, full kitchen, utility room, and primary suite — a versatile layout with multiple exterior color choices.

name: Brown Eyed Girl
desc: Brown Eyed Girl (57TMI28604AH) packs 4 bedrooms and 2 baths into 1,580 sq ft across a 28×60 ft double-wide footprint. A great family home with open kitchen, living and dining areas, and a split bedroom layout for added privacy.

name: Imagine
desc: Imagine (57TPO14401AH) is Clayton Tempo's entry-level single-wide — 1 bedroom, 1 bath, and 560 sq ft in a compact 14×40 ft footprint. Perfect for investors seeking the most affordable new manufactured home option for infill lots and rural parcels.

name: Satisfaction
desc: Satisfaction (57TPO14482AH) is a 2-bedroom, 1-bath single-wide with 672 sq ft in a 14×48 ft footprint. An affordable entry option for single-wide lot placements with a practical layout and Clayton Tempo quality.

name: Respect
desc: Respect (57TPO14602AH) delivers 2 bedrooms and 2 full baths in 840 sq ft — a 14×60 ft single-wide offering great value for rural lots. Two full baths at this price point is a standout feature for tenant appeal.

name: Good Vibrations
desc: Good Vibrations (57TPO14663AH) packs 3 bedrooms and 2 baths into 924 sq ft across a 14×66 ft single-wide. One of the best value 3-bed options in the lineup for tight infill lots.

name: Yesterday
desc: Yesterday (57TPO16441AH) is a compact 1-bedroom, 1-bath single-wide with 660 sq ft in a 16×44 ft footprint. The most efficient layout in the Tempo lineup — ideal for single-occupant rentals or ADU placements.

name: Layla
desc: Layla (57TPO16522AH) offers 2 bedrooms and 2 baths in 832 sq ft across a 16×52 ft single-wide footprint. A versatile single-wide with two full baths for great tenant appeal.

name: Still The One
desc: Still The One (57TPO16562AH) is a 2-bedroom, 2-bath single-wide with 840 sq ft across a 16×56 ft footprint. Features a living room, kitchen, utility room, primary bedroom, and guest suite — all in a clean, efficient layout.

name: Born To Run
desc: Born To Run (57TPO16602AH) is a 2-bedroom, 2-bath single-wide with 900 sq ft in a 16×60 ft footprint. Spacious single-wide layout with living room, kitchen, utility room, and private bedroom suites.

name: Rhythm Nation
desc: Rhythm Nation (57TPO16663AH) is a 3-bedroom, 2-bath single-wide with 990 sq ft in a 16×66 ft footprint. Features a living room, kitchen, foyer, utility room, and split bedroom layout with primary suite.

name: Sweet Dreams
desc: Sweet Dreams (57TPO28403AH) is a 3-bedroom, 2-bath double-wide with 1,053 sq ft in a 28×40 ft footprint. An entry-level double-wide offering the space and comfort of a wider home at a competitive price.

name: Beautiful Morning
desc: Beautiful Morning (57TPO28443AH) offers 3 bedrooms, 2 baths, and 1,158 sq ft in a 28×44 ft double-wide. A comfortable mid-range option with plenty of room for a small family.

name: Under Pressure
desc: Under Pressure (57TPO28483AH) delivers 3 bedrooms and 2 baths in 1,264 sq ft across a 28×48 ft double-wide. Available in Clay, Flint, Olive, and White exterior finishes with a flex room and spacious primary suite.

name: Free Bird
desc: Free Bird (57TPO28523AH) is a 3-bedroom, 2-bath double-wide with 1,369 sq ft across a 28×52 ft footprint. Spacious open layout perfect for families looking for room to spread out.

name: Johnny B Goode
desc: Johnny B Goode (57TPO28523PH) delivers 3 bedrooms and 2 baths in 1,305 sq ft across a 28×52 ft double-wide. Features a dining area, open kitchen, guest bedrooms, and a private primary suite with multiple exterior color options.

name: Stayin' Alive
desc: Stayin' Alive (57TPO28563PH) is a 3-bedroom, 2-bath double-wide with 1,410 sq ft in a 28×56 ft footprint. Features an open dining area, full kitchen, and split bedroom layout with a private primary suite.

name: Rocket Man
desc: Rocket Man (57TPO28663AH) is one of the largest single-section double-wides in the Tempo lineup — 3 bedrooms, 2 baths, and 1,738 sq ft across a 28×66 ft footprint. Features a sitting room, full kitchen, living room, and spacious primary suite.

name: Hey Jude
desc: Hey Jude (57TPO28724AH) is a 4-bedroom, 2-bath double-wide with 1,896 sq ft in a 28×72 ft footprint. One of the largest in the Tempo lineup with a living room, dining area, kitchen, flex space, and 4 full bedrooms.

name: Superfly
desc: Superfly (57TPO28764AH) is the flagship of the Tempo lineup — 4 bedrooms, 2 baths, and 2,128 sq ft in a massive 28×76 ft double-wide footprint. Maximum space at a competitive manufactured home price point.

name: Limelight
desc: Limelight (57TPO32563AH) is a 3-bedroom, 2-bath double-wide with 1,680 sq ft in a 32×56 ft footprint — the widest single-section in the Tempo lineup. Features a spacious living area, dining room, utility room, and a generous primary suite.
